zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Henhull Esquire於大約1339年出生在英國英格蘭爾亨爾時，他的父親John de Henhull28歲，母親Mrs John de Henhull26歲。他於大約1363年與Elen Worleston在英國英格蘭爾亨爾結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1385年6月享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard de Henhull Esquire于大约1339年出生在英国英格兰爾亨爾时，他的父亲John de Henhull28岁，母亲Mrs John de Henhull26岁。他于大约1363年与Elen Worleston在英国英格兰爾亨爾结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1385年6月享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Henhull Esquire was born about 1339, in Henhull, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Henhull, was 28 and his mother, Mrs John de Henhull, was 26. He married Elen Worleston about 1363, in Henhull, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. He died about June 1385, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Henhull Esquire est né environ 1339, à Henhull, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Henhull, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mrs John de Henhull, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Elen Worleston environ 1363, à Henhull, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Il est décédé environ juin 1385, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Henhull Esquire um 1339 in Henhull, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Henhull 28 und seine Mutter Mrs John de Henhull 26. Er hat um 1363 in Henhull, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Elen Worleston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Er starb um Juni 1385 im Alter von 47 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Henhull Esquire è nato il circa 1339 nel Henhull, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John de Henhull, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Mrs John de Henhull, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Elen Worleston circa 1363, nel Henhull, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Morì circa giugno 1385, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Henhull Esquireが約1339年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアヘンハルで生まれた時，父John de Henhullは28歳，母Mrs John de Henhullは26歳であった。約1363年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアヘンハルでElen Worlestonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼は約1385年6月に47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Henhull Esquire(이)가 대략 1339년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 헨훌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Henhull(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs John de Henhull(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1363년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 헨훌에서 Elen Worleston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1385년 6월 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Henhull Esquire nasceu aproximadamente 1339, em Henhull, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Henhull, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Mrs John de Henhull, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Elen Worleston aproximadamente 1363, em Henhull, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente junho de 1385, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Henhull Esquire родился около 1339 г. в местности хенулл, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Henhull было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs John de Henhull, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Elen Worleston около 1363 г. в местности хенулл, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Он умер около июнь 1385 г. в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard de Henhull Esquire nació aproximadamente 1339, en Henhull, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John de Henhull, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Mrs John de Henhull, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Elen Worleston aproximadamente 1363, en Henhull, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Murió aproximadamente junio de 1385, a la edad de 47 años.
